name: FLOW_04_SITE_VISIT_SCHEDULER
description: Guides lead through site visit scheduling and logistics

nodes.content:
✈️ Site Visit Information:

You have two options:

1. VIRTUAL TOUR (30 min) → Today/Tomorrow
   • 360° property views
   • Q&A with manager
   • Floor plans shared

2. IN-PERSON VISIT → 3-5 days to arrange
   • Flight from Manila: 1 hour
   • We arrange airport pickup
   • Full property tour + lunch
   • Financing review possible

Which interests you?

📹 Virtual Tour Scheduling:

When works best for you?

Current availability: Today 3pm-5pm PHT, Tomorrow 10am-12pm PHT

🏠 In-Person Visit Planning:

What's your preferred date range?

• Next 3 days: Rush (additional fee: PHP 5,000)
• Next week: Standard
• Next month: Flexible

Note: Includes airport pickup, meals, tour, 2 nights accommodation.

⚡ Rush Visit (Next 3 Days):

Confirm details:
• Exact departure date?
• Departure city? (Manila/Cebu/Other)
• Any dietary restrictions?

We'll confirm slots within the hour.

📅 Standard Visit (Next Week):

Please provide:
• Preferred dates (give 2-3 options)
• Departure city?
• Traveling with anyone?

We'll send itinerary within 24 hours.

🗓️ Flexible Visit Planning:

We'll keep your details for Q2 scheduling.

In the meantime:
• Virtual tour recommended?
• Monthly updates on project?
• Investment prospectus via email?

What would help?

ℹ️ What to Expect:

VIRTUAL:
• 30 minutes with manager
• See all rooms + amenities
• Ask anything
• Recording provided

IN-PERSON:
• 2-day immersion
• Full transparency
• Meet team + owners
• Final questions answered

Both are free with no obligation.
